headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim After Split Analyst Revisions On Mixed Q1
summary: Kroger’s latest update comes with a lower estimated fair value, moving from US$73.41 to US$70.71, which has fed directly into fresh scrutiny of the stock’s price targets. Recent research is split, as some analysts focus on near term execution risks after mixed Q1 2026 results, while others emphasize Kroger’s longer term turnaround plans and market share goals. Read on to see how these shifting views are shaping the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch next in the Kroger story. Stay...
